title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・連星の宴

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing the race with her rivals, Admire
Vega receives an invitation from T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which she assures me is not the reason she wants to run in the Japan Cup next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm determined to give her my full support as she
excitedly prepares for the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Elsewhere, someone sees a gap growing between
her and her peers.
